data.title: Create eval-daily.yml GitHub Actions cron workflow
data.description:
Create the GitHub Actions daily cron workflow for eval execution.

## Implementation
Follow ticket-lifecycle.yml pattern:
- File: .github/workflows/eval-daily.yml
- Schedule: daily cron (e.g., 0 4 * * * — after ticket-lifecycle at 0 3 * * *)
- workflow_dispatch for manual triggering
- Concurrency group: eval-daily, cancel-in-progress: false

### Job steps:
1. Checkout main (actions/checkout@v4, fetch-depth: 1, ref: main)
2. Setup Node.js (actions/setup-node@v4) for promptfoo
3. Install npm dependencies (npm install)
4. Mount tickets branch as worktree (same pattern as ticket-lifecycle.yml)
5. Configure git user (same pattern as ticket-lifecycle.yml)
6. Run eval-daily-runner.sh with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from secrets
7. Push ticket branch changes (if any)
8. Job timing report

### Permissions:
- contents: write (for ticket branch push)

### Secrets needed:
- ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (for Claude API calls via promptfoo)

## Test Exemption
test-exempt: declarative YAML workflow file with no conditional logic. All behavioral logic is in eval-daily-runner.sh (tested in T1). Any test would be a change-detector asserting YAML structure.
Justification: (1) no conditional logic, (2) test would only assert file exists or contains keys, (3) purely CI configuration wiring.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Workflow file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.github/workflows/eval-daily.yml
- [ ] Workflow has schedule trigger
  Verify: grep -q 'schedule:' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.github/workflows/eval-daily.yml
- [ ] Workflow has workflow_dispatch trigger
  Verify: grep -q 'workflow_dispatch' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.github/workflows/eval-daily.yml
- [ ] Workflow references eval-daily-runner.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'eval-daily-runner.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.github/workflows/eval-daily.yml
- [ ] Workflow includes Node.js setup
  Verify: grep -q 'setup-node' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.github/workflows/eval-daily.yml
- [ ] Workflow includes ANTHROPIC_API_KEY secret reference
  Verify: grep -q 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.github/workflows/eval-daily.yml
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

## Files to modify
- .github/workflows/eval-daily.yml (create)
